fonts.info: Fonts you upload here live under the app's fonts folder and become selectable in the slide text Font picker. They render on every surface (editor, deck, wiki and PDF). Factory fonts are marked SEED and can be restored if removed.
fonts.list.title: Font library
fonts.list.empty: No fonts yet. Upload a .woff2, .woff, .ttf or .otf file.
fonts.confirm.delete_message: Delete "{0}"? This removes the font file permanently.
fonts.confirm.reset_message: Remove "{0}"? It is a factory font and can be brought back with Restore default fonts.
